AVEMUJICA-KEYBOARD.description: 戦闘開始時、[gold]作曲[/gold]:[blue]{Compose}[/blue] [gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
AVEMUJICA-KEYBOARD.flavor: 幼少期から一緒だった楽器。最愛の母との最後の繋がり。
AVEMUJICA-KEYBOARD.title: キーボード
AVEMUJICA-GRAND_PIANO.description: 最初の{Turns:plural:ターン|[blue]{}[/blue] ターン}の開始時、[gold]作曲[/gold]:[blue]{Compose}[/blue] [gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る
AVEMUJICA-GRAND_PIANO.flavor: 再び舞台に立つよう、彼女を誘っている。
AVEMUJICA-GRAND_PIANO.title: グランドピアノ
AVEMUJICA-PLAYFUL_CORETTON.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{DreamThreadPower}[/blue] [gold]Dream Thread[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-PLAYFUL_CORETTON.flavor: She found it unnerving how quickly they could switch from cute to terrifying.
AVEMUJICA-PLAYFUL_CORETTON.title: Playful Coretton
AVEMUJICA-NOSTALGIC_SHEET_MUSIC.flavor: Even if their lines would never intersect again, that didn't mean they couldn't still walk side-by-side.
AVEMUJICA-NOSTALGIC_SHEET_MUSIC.title: Nostalgic Sheet Music
AVEMUJICA-MASQUERADE_MASK.description: The first time you [gold]Perform[/gold] each turn, draw a card.
AVEMUJICA-MASQUERADE_MASK.flavor: The masquerade begins. The dolls stir to life.
AVEMUJICA-MASQUERADE_MASK.title: Masquerade Mask
AVEMUJICA-NOTEBOOK.flavor: In times of hardship, she finds strength in the words inside.
AVEMUJICA-NOTEBOOK.title: Notebook
AVEMUJICA-PUPPET_STRINGS.flavor: She thinks it ironic that even in such a strange place, there were still so many puppets futily dancing on their strings.
AVEMUJICA-PUPPET_STRINGS.title: Puppet Strings
